---
title: "NPOR: Validating measures"
author: Jelle van der Werff
date: 11/08/2023
output:
    html_notebook:
        code_folding: hide
        toc: true
        toc_float: true
---


```{r load-packages, message = FALSE, echo = FALSE}
############# PACKAGES AND OTHER PRELIMINARIES ############

# for easy loading of packages
if (!require("pacman")) install.packages("pacman")

# load packages
p_load('here')

# for relative file paths (e.g. here('Input', 'file.csv'))
here::i_am(file.path("scripts", "validating_measures.Rmd"))

# Load custom helper functions
source(here("scripts", "helper_functions.R"))

# Knitr output settingsecho = TRUE,
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
    echo = FALSE,
    warning = TRUE,
    message = FALSE
)
```


```{r load-data}

# Load data
ITIs <- read.csv(here("data", "experiment", "processed", "ITIs.csv"))
pp.measures <- read.csv(here("data", "experiment", "processed", "by_pp.csv"))

```

# Validating measures

Correlations between entropy and G
```{r check-correlations-between-measures}
cor(pp.measures$entropy_diff_avg, pp.measures$G_diff)
```

No correlation there.
